footer.brand_description: The best pinball and arcade space in Latin America. A unique nostalgic experience in São Paulo.
footer.address:
Teodoro Sampaio St, 2038 - Pinheiros
São Paulo - SP, 05406-150
footer.payment_info: We accept Pix, debit and credit cards

hero.award_text: TWIPY Awards Winner • Best Arcade in Latin America

atmosphere.title: The Atmosphere
atmosphere.description: Every corner of Old School has been designed to transport you back to the golden era of arcades. Voted Best Pinball Space in Latin America and proud international winner of the coveted TWIPY Awards in Texas, USA (March 2023).

batman.title: Batman's Corner
batman.desc: A corner dedicated to the Dark Knight with collectibles, art, and the gloomy atmosphere of Gotham City.

geek.title: Geek & Star Wars Environment
geek.desc: Action figures, vintage posters, neon lights, and all the pop culture of the 80s and 90s gathered in an intergalactic themed space.

dance.title: Dance Floor & DJ
dance.desc: Dance to the greatest hits of the 80s and 90s driven by our live DJ! Retro lighting and lots of energy to the right beat.

american_bar.title: American Bar
american_bar.description: An American retro diner inside Old School. Eat, drink, and play - all in one place!

machines.title: Our Machines
machines.description: Over 30 classic pinball and arcade machines. All games set to free play - play as much as you want!

media.title: Media
media.description: Watch highlight reels, tournaments, and virtual tours straight from Old School Pinball.

events.title: Events & Rentals
events.description: Birthday parties, corporate events, podcast recordings, commercials, and more! Book for your exclusive event.

birthday.title: Birthday Parties
birthday.description: Celebrate your birthday in a different way! Exclusive space with machines, DJ, and full bar.

corporate.title: Corporate Events
corporate.description: A unique team building! Relaxed atmosphere for socializing, happy hours, and company events.

podcast.title: Recordings & Podcasts
podcast.description: Podcast recordings, commercials, and audiovisual productions. An authentic and unique retro scenery.

media.title: Media Productions
media.description: Photoshoots, filming, and productions featuring an 80s arcade theme.

tickets.title: Passports
tickets.description: Play as much as you want! All games set to free play. Every Thursday and Saturday from 6 PM to midnight.

online.name: Full Price
online.description: 10% discount only here on the website! Play all machines as much as you want - no tokens.

door.name: At the Door
door.description: Full passport. Pay at the entrance and enjoy the whole night.

kids.name: Children
kids.description: On Saturdays, children up to 12 years old pay R$ 63. Play freely!

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Come visit us or get in touch. We are waiting for you!

info.address_value: R. Teodureto Souto, 292a - Cambuci, São Paulo - SP, 01541-000
info.hours_value: Thursdays and Saturdays - 6 PM to Midnight

cookies.title: Privacy Policies
cookies.message: We only use basic cookies to keep your language preferences saved locally. We do not track or sell your personal data. By continuing to navigate, you agree to our terms.
cookies.modal_content:
Old School Pinball values your privacy in accordance with data protection laws.

We do not maintain server databases to store user profiles, passwords, or tracking behaviors.

We exclusively use browser 'Local Storage' to remember your language choice (such as English or Portuguese) in future visits and to hide this consent notice.

No personal information is transferred, sold, or mapped by our online service.

If you have questions regarding our digital or physical operations, feel free to contact us via WhatsApp.

chatbot.title: OSB Support Terminal
chatbot.welcome: Greetings, Player 1! I am the Old School Pinball Artificial Intelligence Assistant. What can I help you with today?
chatbot.fallback: Command not recognized. In my 16-bit memory banks, I only hold data concerning the topics below. Need human help? WhatsApp us: +55 11 91562-0127.

answers.tickets: You can buy advance tickets right here on the website with a 10% discount! The 'Free Play' passport lets you play every machine with no tokens required. Check the top menu button.
answers.location: We are located at R. Teodureto Souto, 292a - Cambuci, São Paulo - SP. Boarding hours are Thursdays and Saturdays, from 6 PM to midnight!
answers.games: Our fleet includes over 30 classic pinball and arcade machines. All games are on free play - play as much as you want without tokens!
